case_title: FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC VS. ANNETTE FLOWERS et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC SERVED OCT-21-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FLOWERS, ANNETTE
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FLOWERS, ANNETTE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $240.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT FLOWERS, ANNETTE
DECLARATION DIANE WESTBERG FILED RE: (CCP 585(D); CCP 1033) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC AS TO DEFENDANT FLOWERS, ANNETTE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-13-2009

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLOWERS, ANNETTE $8,413.26 PRINCIPAL, $1,175.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $660.10 INTEREST, $240.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,488.36, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $2,286.72 INTEREST, $37.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
